title: Phishing Reset Email
scenario: An email says your account will be locked unless you reset your password. It includes a link to a login page.

answers.A: Click the link and reset the password now.
answers.B: Copy the link to check where it goes.
answers.C: Go to the official company login page/app and reset via the verified workflow.
answers.D: Report the email and do not interact with it.

explanation: Account-lock phishing uses urgency to steal credentials. Use official login flows and report suspicious messages.
proTip: Never use password-reset links from unsolicited emails.
